actual_column_names: Incident Being or Not Reported to Police

irregularities.label: EMBEDDED_DIMENSION_IN_COLUMN
irregularities.evidence: Column [5] headers contain values such as "身體虐待 - 男性", "精神虐待 - 男性", and similar cells throughout the sheet.
irregularities.details: The cell values in Column [5] encode both the type of abuse and the gender using " - " as a delimiter, thus embedding multiple dimensions in one column.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: Column [0] ("年份/Year") has values only at the beginning of each year block (e.g., 2005, 2006) and mostly empty in between.
irregularities.details: This implies the year values are filled at the start of each new section, and the blank cells indicate continuation of the same year for subsequent rows.
